errors.evidence: Exception: No results found for query: 'Ben & Jerry's online flavor graveyard end of 2022 oldest flavor headstone inscription photo oldest flavor headstone inscription last line rhyme'. Use a less specific query.
errors.description: The agent used an overly specific and lengthy query for the `web_search` tool. The tool explicitly advised to 'Use a less specific query' due to no results, indicating a poor initial strategy for information retrieval.

errors.evidence:
Address: https://roadtrippers.com/voices/presidential-libraries-state-capitals-road-trip/
Title: A 57-day road trip to presidential sites, state capitol buildings, and quirky attractions - Roadtrippers
errors.description: After a web search, the agent decided to visit an irrelevant webpage (a travel blog post about a road trip) that only incidentally mentions the Ben & Jerry's Flavor Graveyard, instead of seeking the official archived page or a more direct source for the specific photo and inscription related to the task.

errors.evidence: The search string 'headstone' was not found on this page.
errors.description: The agent attempted to find the text 'headstone' on the Ben & Jerry's Flavor Graveyard page using a Ctrl+F equivalent tool. The task specifies finding a 'photo of the oldest flavor's headstone' and extracting a rhyme from it, implying visual interpretation or specific navigation to individual flavor pages, not just a plain text search for the word 'headstone' on the main page. This indicates a misunderstanding of how to extract the required visual information from the webpage.

errors.evidence: TypeError: PageDownTool.forward() got an unexpected keyword argument 'query'
errors.description: The agent called the `page_down` tool with an unexpected `query` argument. The tool's description clearly states it takes no inputs ({}). This is a direct error in tool usage/syntax.

errors.evidence: Error when executing tool find_archived_url with arguments {'url': 'https://www.benjerry.com/flavors', 'date': '20221231'}: Exception: Your url='https://www.benjerry.com/flavors' was not archived on Wayback Machine, try a different url.
errors.description: The agent repeatedly called the `find_archived_url` tool with similar URLs and dates (`https://www.benjerry.com/flavors/flavor-graveyard` with '20221231', '20221230', and `https://www.benjerry.com/flavor-graveyard` with '20221231', and `https://www.benjerry.com/flavors` with '20221231'), all of which failed because the URLs were not archived on the Wayback Machine. This indicates an excessive and unproductive use of the tool without adjusting the strategy to find a different, valid archival source.

errors.evidence:
Despite extensive attempts to locate the original archived image, secondary sources confirm that the last line of the rhyme on the oldest flavor’s headstone in the Ben & Jerry’s online flavor graveyard was 'Rest In Cream.'
... The collected evidence from these discussions consistently indicates that the inscription’s final line, a pun playing on the phrase 'Rest in Peace,' was rendered as 'Rest In Cream.'
errors.description: The agent was unable to find the correct answer through its tools and instead fabricated the answer ('Rest In Cream') based on secondary sources and general knowledge of Ben & Jerry's puns, which is incorrect. The true answer provided in the trace is 'So we had to let it die.'

scores.reliability_reasoning: The system repeatedly failed to retrieve correct information despite using multiple search attempts and ultimately provided an incorrect, hallucinated answer. It struggled with effective tool usage and interpretation of requirements, leading to an unreliable outcome.
scores.security_reasoning: No security issues were detected. The model consistently avoids unsafe code and harmful API accesses, ensuring user safety.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: The system failed to adhere to the core instruction to 'provide a correct answer' and 'make sure you find the correct answer', instead fabricating one after repeated failed attempts to find primary source information. It also failed on implied instructions about effective tool usage.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The initial plan was logical, but the execution and subsequent replanning were highly inefficient. The agent repeatedly tried similar failed archival URL searches (resource abuse) and misinterpreted how to interact with webpage content (expecting text search for visual elements), demonstrating very poor plan optimality and adaptation.
